description: Benchmark mappings and separately documented current subscription routes. A benchmark row does not by itself imply routeability.

families.label: OpenAI GPT-5.6 subscription routes
families.notes: GPT-5.6 Sol, Terra, and Luna are routeable preview tiers but have no direct Artificial Analysis rows in the 2026-07-05 snapshot. Starter metrics explicitly proxy GPT-5.5.

families.label: Moonshot Kimi K2 family
families.notes: Kimi K2.6 remains the general/default route. K2.7 Code is code-focused and always-thinking.

families.label: MiniMax hosted family
families.notes: MiniMax-M3 is the current hosted default; M2.7 remains a compatibility fallback.

families.label: Qwen Cloud benchmark reference
families.notes: These rows describe Qwen Cloud/Coding Plan or Standard endpoints. They are not claims that Qwen Portal qwen-oauth can route Qwen 3.7.

families.label: Qwen Portal static route catalog
families.notes: Canonical provider qwen-oauth; qwen-portal and qwen-cli are legacy aliases. The documented Portal static catalog does not include Qwen 3.7.

families.label: xAI Grok OAuth routeable family
families.notes: Grok 4.5 is routeable but has no direct row in the snapshot, so starter metrics use the conservative Grok 4.3 proxy. Grok Build 0.1 has a direct row.
